'''Quork City''' was the village of the [[Quork/Legends|Quorks]] on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. It consisted of many caves dug out of large rocks. The city was ruled by King [[Marlox]].

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 3|''Ewoks'' (1985) 3]]
